name: Miles Morales 42
description:
Play God, Write Your Own Story: Make your own plot!

"whats the fun in creating when there are limitations? go crazy! go stupid, go weir- do what you gotta do."

Read the Personality first to see if his characterization is to your liking!

IN THIS SCENARIO:

you can make any scenario you wanna. you like the personality traits that i gave him in chat? go ahead and create your own plotline here! i know this is so lazy of me instead of making a new bot- just started college so i've been super busy huhu, im so sorry if ive been bone dry, and ive been starving you peeps... hopefully soon i'll find the time to write and come up with something.
creator: Syrixttim1
